programme.title: Madea's Family Reunion
programme.desc: A take-no-trash-from-anybody matriarch tries to throw a family reunion to hold her family together.

programme.title: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: A seemingly solid marriage begins to crumble when the wife discovers her husband intends to divorce her.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: A mortal teams with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, the god of darkness, who usurped Egypt's throne.

programme.title: Brotherhood of Justice
programme.desc: High-school students start a vigilante group. But as their power increases, they become more dangerous.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman in Bangkok working a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: An entire team disappeared while on an expedition into the Grand Canyon in search of a rumored hidden city.

programme.title: Crank
programme.desc: An assassin learns his rival has injected him with a poison that will kill him if his heart rate drops.

programme.title: The Woman in Black 2: Angel of Death
programme.desc: 40 years after the first haunting at Eel Marsh House, kids arrive and awaken the house's darkest inhabitant.

programme.title: First Born
programme.desc: A woman who wanted nothing more than to become a mother finds her sanity slipping after the birth of her child

programme.title: The Vatican Tapes
programme.desc: Angela is possessed by a satanic force and it's up to Father Lozano to save her soul and the entire world.

programme.title: Goblin
programme.desc: Every Halloween, a small hamlet is visited by a goblin, capturing infants and murdering anyone in its path.
A man who specialises in debunking paranormal occurrences checks into fabled room 1408 in the Dolphin Hotel.

programme.title: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A man plagued by horrific nightmares travels to his childhood home to finally rid himself of the visions.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
